ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "botanical_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height the plant can reach in feet */,
  "max_girth" TEXT /* Maximum girth the plant can achieve in inches */,
  "max_crown_spread" REAL /* Maximum crown spread the plant can achieve in feet */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth per year in feet */,
  "hardiness_zone" INTEGER /* Hardiness zone of the plant */,
  "sun_requirement" TEXT /* Sun requirement of the plant (e.g., full sun, partial shade) */,
  "water_requirement" TEXT /* Water requirement of the plant (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type preferred by the plant (e.g., acidic, alkaline, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the growth was recorded */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the plant at the time of recording in feet */,
  "girth" TEXT /* Girth of the plant at the time of recording in inches */,
  "crown_spread" REAL /* Crown spread of the plant at the time of recording in feet */,
  "growth_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the growth record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., leaf, flower, bark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species */,
  "description_text" TEXT /* Text of the plant description */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the description was uploaded */,
  "description_type" TEXT /* Type of description (e.g., botanical, horticultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., botanist, gardener, researcher) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, botanical garden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the plant data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_images" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image-plant-user association */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the image is shared (e.g., Creative Commons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_descriptions" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description-plant-user association */,
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the description */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the description */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the description was uploaded */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_descriptions_description_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_id") REFERENCES descriptions ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_descriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_locations_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant species */,
  "related_plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related plant species */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_relationships_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_relationships_related_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)
